expectedGainMet.description: True if post-intervention telemetry metrics confirmed target improvement

compromiseWorseThanForecast.description: True if cascading penalties exceeded predicted tradeoff margins

empiricalPaceGainS.description: Measured average lap time pace improvement (negative is faster)

confidenceDelta.description: Dynamic weight shift applied to future recommendations (+ for success, - for failure)

setupContribution.description: Attributed percentage of the gain due strictly to the mechanical setup change

environmentContribution.description: Attributed percentage of the gain due to fuel burn-off, track rubber, or track temp drops

driverAdaptation.description: Attributed percentage of the gain due to smoother driver steering or brake decay gradients

stochasticVariance.description: Attributed percentage of the gain due to traffic, tow, or random sector noise

validationStatus.description: Overall status of the closed-loop evaluation

feedbackNarrative.description: Narrative summarizing observed pre vs post behavior differences
